title: Theoria Division — Directive Schema
description: Standard directive format written by Hermes, approved by Arbiter, addressed to Operations agents.

directive_id.description: Unique directive ID. Format: DIR-YYYY-MM-DD-<n>. Example: DIR-2026-03-29-1.

target_agent.description: The Operations agent this directive is addressed to.

issued_by.description: Always Hermes. Hermes is the only agent that writes directives.

approved_by.description: Always Arbiter. No directive is valid without Arbiter approval.

cycle.description: The cycle this directive takes effect from.

priority.description: HIGH = agent must apply before next run. STANDARD = apply at next natural cycle.

type.description: prompt_optimization = refine how agent reasons/outputs. behavior_correction = fix a specific failure. scope_change = alter what agent is responsible for.

instruction_summary.description: One-sentence summary of the directive. Used for logging and Citadel display.
